query: UPDATE book_profiles SET ratingCount = REPLACE(ratingCount, ',', '') WHERE ratingCount IS NOT NULL AND ratingCount LIKE '%,%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute UPDATE book_profiles SET ratingCount = REPLACE(ratingCount, ',', '') WHERE ratingCount IS NOT NULL AND ratingCount LIKE '%,%';
